configurations.name: dev
runtimeArgs: if lsof -ti:5173 >/dev/null 2>&1; then echo 'Dev server already listening on :5173 — attaching to it.'; exec tail -f /dev/null; else echo 'No dev server on :5173 — starting the full dev environment (scripts/dev-pre-launch.sh).'; exec bash scripts/dev-pre-launch.sh; fi
